revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{High-use|1645}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== [[Template:Decade in country category]] is intended to be used on '''decade in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2000s in Canada]] or [[:Category:1530s in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent decades before or after it (see example below). == Syntax == {{Decade in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1860s in Japan]]: {{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|decade=1860}}
=== Example using four parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1950s in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|decade=1950}}
=== Fifth parameter for new name === *An unnamed 5th parameter may be specified as a new country name to be used in generating some of the parent categories. For example, the following placed on the page [[:Category:1920s in Siam]] generates the parents [[:Category:Decades in Thailand]] rather than the non-existent {{cat|Decades in Siam}}, and [[:Category:20th century in Thailand]] rather than {{cat|20th century in Siam}}: {{Decade in country category|Siam|Asia|Southeast Asia||Thailand}} *Alternatively, the fifth parameter may be given the caption "newname" as used at [[:Category:1950s in Spanish Guinea]]. *The related template [[Template:Year in country category]] also has a parameter "newnamestart", to indicate the first year in which the new name is used in categories; however, "newnamestart" has not been implemented in this decade template code, and therefore if specified has no effect. *Cases where the fifth parameter is specified are in the tracking category [[:Category:Decade in country category with newname parameter]]. ==Subtemplate== * {{tl|Decade in country category/core}} == See also == * {{tl|Year in country category}} * {{tl|Category series navigation}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{High-use|1645}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== [[Template:Decade in country category]] is intended to be used on '''decade in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2000s in Canada]] or [[:Category:1530s in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent decades before or after it (see example below). == Syntax == {{Decade in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1860s in Japan]]: {{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|decade=1860}}
=== Example using four parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1950s in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|decade=1950}}
=== Fifth parameter for new name === *An unnamed 5th parameter may be specified as a new country name to be used in generating some of the parent categories. For example, the following placed on the page [[:Category:1920s in Siam]] generates the parents [[:Category:Decades in Thailand]] rather than the non-existent {{cat|Decades in Siam}}, and [[:Category:20th century in Thailand]] rather than {{cat|20th century in Siam}}: {{Decade in country category|Siam|Asia|Southeast Asia||Thailand}} *Alternatively, the fifth parameter may be given the caption "newname" as used at [[:Category:1950s in Spanish Guinea]]. *The related template [[Template:Year in country category]] also has a parameter "newnamestart", to indicate the first year in which the new name is used in categories; however, "newnamestart" has not been implemented in this decade template code, and therefore if specified has no effect. *Cases where the fifth parameter is specified are in the tracking category [[:Category:Decade in country category with newname parameter]]. ==Subtemplate== * {{tl|Decade in country category/core}} == See also == * {{tl|Year in country category}} * {{tl|Category series navigation}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{High-use|1645}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== [[Template:Decade in country category]] is intended to be used on '''decade in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2000s in Canada]] or [[:Category:1530s in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent decades before or after it (see example below). == Syntax == {{Decade in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1860s in Japan]]: {{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|decade=1860}}
=== Example using four parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1950s in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|decade=1950}}
=== Fifth parameter for new name === *An unnamed 5th parameter may be specified as a new country name to be used in generating some of the parent categories. For example, the following placed on the page [[:Category:1920s in Siam]] generates the parents [[:Category:Decades in Thailand]] rather than the non-existent {{cat|Decades in Siam}}, and [[:Category:20th century in Thailand]] rather than {{cat|20th century in Siam}}: {{Decade in country category|Siam|Asia|Southeast Asia||Thailand}} *Alternatively, the fifth parameter may be given the caption "newname" as used at [[:Category:1950s in Spanish Guinea]]. *The related template [[Template:Year in country category]] also has a parameter "newnamestart", to indicate the first year in which the new name is used in categories; however, "newnamestart" has not been implemented in this decade template code, and therefore if specified has no effect. *Cases where the fifth parameter is specified are in the tracking category [[:Category:Decade in country category with newname parameter]]. ==Subtemplate== * {{tl|Decade in country category/core}} == See also == * {{tl|Year in country category}} * {{tl|Category series navigation}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{High-use|1645}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== [[Template:Decade in country category]] is intended to be used on '''decade in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2000s in Canada]] or [[:Category:1530s in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent decades before or after it (see example below). == Syntax == {{Decade in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1860s in Japan]]: {{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|decade=1860}}
=== Example using four parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1950s in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|decade=1950}}
=== Fifth parameter for new name === *An unnamed 5th parameter may be specified as a new country name to be used in generating some of the parent categories. For example, the following placed on the page [[:Category:1920s in Siam]] generates the parents [[:Category:Decades in Thailand]] rather than the non-existent {{cat|Decades in Siam}}, and [[:Category:20th century in Thailand]] rather than {{cat|20th century in Siam}}: {{Decade in country category|Siam|Asia|Southeast Asia||Thailand}} *Alternatively, the fifth parameter may be given the caption "newname" as used at [[:Category:1950s in Spanish Guinea]]. *The related template [[Template:Year in country category]] also has a parameter "newnamestart", to indicate the first year in which the new name is used in categories; however, "newnamestart" has not been implemented in this decade template code, and therefore if specified has no effect. *Cases where the fifth parameter is specified are in the tracking category [[:Category:Decade in country category with newname parameter]]. ==Subtemplate== * {{tl|Decade in country category/core}} == See also == * {{tl|Year in country category}} * {{tl|Category series navigation}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{High-use|1645}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== [[Template:Decade in country category]] is intended to be used on '''decade in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2000s in Canada]] or [[:Category:1530s in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent decades before or after it (see example below). == Syntax == {{Decade in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1860s in Japan]]: {{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|decade=1860}}
=== Example using four parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1950s in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|decade=1950}}
=== Fifth parameter for new name === *An unnamed 5th parameter may be specified as a new country name to be used in generating some of the parent categories. For example, the following placed on the page [[:Category:1920s in Siam]] generates the parents [[:Category:Decades in Thailand]] rather than the non-existent {{cat|Decades in Siam}}, and [[:Category:20th century in Thailand]] rather than {{cat|20th century in Siam}}: {{Decade in country category|Siam|Asia|Southeast Asia||Thailand}} *Alternatively, the fifth parameter may be given the caption "newname" as used at [[:Category:1950s in Spanish Guinea]]. *The related template [[Template:Year in country category]] also has a parameter "newnamestart", to indicate the first year in which the new name is used in categories; however, "newnamestart" has not been implemented in this decade template code, and therefore if specified has no effect. *Cases where the fifth parameter is specified are in the tracking category [[:Category:Decade in country category with newname parameter]]. ==Subtemplate== * {{tl|Decade in country category/core}} == See also == * {{tl|Year in country category}} * {{tl|Category series navigation}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Decade_in_country_category%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{High-use|1645}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== [[Template:Decade in country category]] is intended to be used on '''decade in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2000s in Canada]] or [[:Category:1530s in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent decades before or after it (see example below). == Syntax == {{Decade in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1860s in Japan]]: {{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|decade=1860}}
=== Example using four parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1950s in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{Decade in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|decade=1950}}
=== Fifth parameter for new name === *An unnamed 5th parameter may be specified as a new country name to be used in generating some of the parent categories. For example, the following placed on the page [[:Category:1920s in Siam]] generates the parents [[:Category:Decades in Thailand]] rather than the non-existent {{cat|Decades in Siam}}, and [[:Category:20th century in Thailand]] rather than {{cat|20th century in Siam}}: {{Decade in country category|Siam|Asia|Southeast Asia||Thailand}} *Alternatively, the fifth parameter may be given the caption "newname" as used at [[:Category:1950s in Spanish Guinea]]. *The related template [[Template:Year in country category]] also has a parameter "newnamestart", to indicate the first year in which the new name is used in categories; however, "newnamestart" has not been implemented in this decade template code, and therefore if specified has no effect. *Cases where the fifth parameter is specified are in the tracking category [[:Category:Decade in country category with newname parameter]]. ==Subtemplate== * {{tl|Decade in country category/core}} == See also == * {{tl|Year in country category}} * {{tl|Category series navigation}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
